prompt: I need to verify my custom color scheme meets WCAG contrast requirements. My text color is #6B7280 on a #F9FAFB background. Does it pass?

assertions.text: States WCAG AA requires 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text
assertions.rationale: Skill documents exact WCAG contrast ratios

assertions.text: Calculates or estimates the contrast ratio for the given colors
assertions.rationale: Skill includes programmatic contrast calculation code

assertions.text: Mentions testing contrast independently for both light AND dark modes
assertions.rationale: Skill's dark mode section requires separate contrast testing

assertions.text: Mentions Increase Contrast setting (colorSchemeContrast == .increased) may need 7:1
assertions.rationale: Skill documents increased contrast behavior; WITHOUT misses this
